title: keetia zanzibarica subsp. cornelioides
intro: Keetia zanzibarica subsp. cornelioides, also known as the cornelioid keetia, is a plant species native to Tanzania and other parts of East Africa. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Keetia zanzibarica subsp. cornelioides include its potential to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat infections, as well as its ability to act as an antioxidant and protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of Keetia zanzibarica subsp. cornelioides include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
